cells.title: Overview
cells.source: This notebook is a runnable browser-first template inspired by Jessica Reale's *Interbank Market and Funding Liquidity Risk in a Stock-Flow Consistent Model* (2019). It keeps the paper's institutional structure in compact form: households, firms, government, a central bank, and two heterogeneous banks linked by overnight and term interbank funding.

cells.title: Template Scope
cells.source: The original paper develops a much larger calibrated system. This template is a starter model rather than a full replication. It preserves the core mechanisms we usually want to extend first in the editor: reserve requirements, deposit splitting across two banks, a borrowing bank's maturity choice between overnight and term funding, a lending bank's overnight-versus-term preference, and a central-bank backstop through a refinancing facility.

cells.title: Table 4: Balance Sheet Matrix
cells.description: Article-style balance-sheet matrix adapted from Table 4 of the paper.
cells.note: This accounting table preserves the paper's full institutional structure. Some symbols shown here go beyond the reduced-form starter equations and are included as a modeling scaffold.

cells.title: Table 5: Transaction Flow Matrix
cells.description: Article-style transaction-flow matrix adapted from Table 5 of the paper.
cells.note: This matrix follows the paper's accounting layout and keeps article notation where helpful. It is meant as a structural modeling template, not a strict one-for-one rendering of the reduced-form executable equations above.

cells.title: Interbank transaction flow sequence
cells.description: Sequence view generated from the Table 5 transaction-flow matrix.

equations.name: Ovd
equations.desc: Accommodating overdrafts supplied by the central bank.

equations.name: itcb
equations.desc: Target policy rate at the midpoint of the corridor.

equations.name: Pcb
equations.expression: itcb * (lag(MROj) + lag(MROk)) + ib * lag(Bcb) + ilcb * lag(Rcb_l) - idcb * lag(Rcb_d)

equations.name: MROj
equations.desc: Main refinancing operations to bank j.

equations.name: MROk
equations.desc: Main refinancing operations to bank k.

equations.name: Bcb
equations.desc: Bills held by the central bank.

equations.name: Lm
equations.desc: Total liabilities entering the degree-of-stability measure.
equations.expression: lag(Dh) + lag(MROj) + lag(Ovd) + lag(IBon) + lag(IBterm) + lag(Rcb_l)

equations.name: Am
equations.desc: Total assets entering the degree-of-stability measure.

equations.name: bm
equations.expression: (m1 * lag(Lh) + m2 * lag(Mh) + m3 * lag(Bj) + m4 * lag(Blr)) / Am

equations.name: DOvd
equations.desc: Demand for overdrafts by bank j.

equations.name: IBD
equations.desc: Total interbank funding demand by bank j.

equations.name: theta
equations.expression: max(0, min(1, alpha * (ilcb - ion_ib) + alpha1 * (iterm_ib - ion_ib) + alpha2 * (DSm / abs(lag(Vbj))) - alpha3 * (ilcb - iterm_ib) - alpha4 * PDU))

equations.name: LbW
equations.expression: max(0, min(1, sigma + sigma1 * PDU + sigma2 * (ion_ib - idcb) + sigma3 * (abs(DERj) - gamma) - sigma4 * (iterm_ib - ion_ib) - sigma5 * (iterm_ib - idcb) - sigma6 * QR))

equations.name: Rcb_l
equations.desc: Use of the lending facility under interbank frictions.
equations.expression: if (((theta <= 0) && (LbW >= 1)) || ((theta >= 1) && (LbW <= 0))) { IBD } else { if ((theta > 0 && theta < 1) && (LbW <= 0)) { IBonD } else { if ((theta > 0 && theta < 1) && (LbW >= 1)) { IBtermD } else { 0 } } }

equations.name: Rcb_d
equations.desc: Use of the deposit facility under interbank frictions.
equations.expression: if (((theta <= 0) && (LbW >= 1)) || ((theta >= 1) && (LbW <= 0))) { IBS } else { if ((theta <= 0) && (LbW > 0 && LbW < 1)) { IBonS } else { if ((theta >= 1) && (LbW > 0 && LbW < 1)) { IBtermS } else { 0 } } }

equations.name: IBon
equations.desc: Stock of overnight interbank loans determined on the short side of the market.

equations.name: IBterm
equations.desc: Stock of term interbank loans determined on the short side of the market.

equations.name: eps_on
equations.desc: Excess demand in the overnight segment.

equations.name: eps_term
equations.desc: Excess demand in the term segment.

equations.name: Lh
equations.desc: Loans supplied by bank j to households.
equations.expression: (lambda10 + lambda11 * ilh - lambda12 * ilrb - lambda13 * imh - lambda14 * ib) * Fj

equations.name: Lf
equations.desc: Loans supplied by bank k to firms.

equations.name: Fj
equations.desc: External finance supplied by bank j.

equations.name: Fk
equations.desc: External finance supplied by bank k.

equations.name: Bjlr
equations.desc: Long-term government bonds demanded by bank j.
equations.expression: (lambda20 - lambda21 * ilh + lambda22 * ilrb - lambda23 * imh - lambda24 * ib) * Fj

equations.name: Mh
equations.expression: (lambda30 - lambda31 * ilh - lambda32 * ilrb + lambda33 * imh - lambda34 * ib) * Fj

equations.name: Bj
equations.desc: Short-term bills demanded by bank j.

equations.name: Bk
equations.desc: Short-term bills demanded by bank k.

equations.name: iib_star
equations.desc: Effective interbank cost faced by bank j.
equations.expression: if (((theta >= 1) && (LbW >= 1)) || ((theta > 0 && theta < 1) && (LbW >= 1)) || ((theta >= 1) && (LbW > 0 && LbW < 1))) { ion_ib } else { if (((theta <= 0) && (LbW <= 0)) || ((theta > 0 && theta < 1) && (LbW <= 0)) || ((theta <= 0) && (LbW > 0 && LbW < 1))) { iterm_ib } else { if ((theta > 0 && theta < 1) && (LbW > 0 && LbW < 1)) { (ion_ib + iterm_ib) / 2 } else { 0 } } }

equations.name: icb_star
equations.desc: Effective standing-facility cost faced by bank j.

equations.name: zeta
equations.desc: Number of cost components entering bank-j average funding costs.

equations.name: Pbj
equations.expression: ib * lag(Bj) + lag(ilh) * lag(Lh) + ilrb * lag(Blr) + lag(imh) * lag(Mh) - itcb * lag(MROj) - lag(idh) * lag(Dh) - ilcb * lag(Rcb_l) - lag(ion_ib) * lag(IBon) - lag(iterm_ib) * lag(IBterm)

equations.name: Pbk
equations.expression: idcb * lag(Rcb_d) + lag(ilf) * lag(Lf) + ib * lag(Bk) + lag(ion_ib) * lag(IBon) + lag(iterm_ib) * lag(IBterm) - lag(idf) * lag(Df) - itcb * lag(MROk)

equations.name: Vbj
equations.expression: lag(Vbj) + (HPMj - lag(HPMj)) + (Bj - lag(Bj)) + (Bjlr - lag(Bjlr)) + (Lh - lag(Lh)) + (Mh - lag(Mh)) - Pbju - (Dh - lag(Dh)) - (Ovd - lag(Ovd)) - (IBon - lag(IBon)) - (IBterm - lag(IBterm)) - (MROj - lag(MROj)) - (Rcb_l - lag(Rcb_l))

equations.name: Vbk
equations.expression: lag(Vbk) + (Bk - lag(Bk)) + (HPMk - lag(HPMk)) + (Lf - lag(Lf)) + (IBon - lag(IBon)) + (IBterm - lag(IBterm)) + (Rcb_d - lag(Rcb_d)) - Pbku - (MROk - lag(MROk)) - (Df - lag(Df))

equations.name: B
equations.desc: Government bills financed through the budget identity.
equations.expression: lag(B) + ib * lag(B) + G + ilrb * lag(Blr) - T - Pcb - (Blr - lag(Blr))

equations.name: Blr
equations.desc: Long-term government bonds supplied to match bank-j demand.

equations.name: ib
equations.desc: Interest rate on bills equals the policy target.

equations.name: Vh
equations.expression: lag(Vh) + Yd + (Lh - lag(Lh)) + (Mh - lag(Mh)) - C - ph * (Hh - lag(Hh)) - (Dh - lag(Dh))

equations.name: Yd
equations.expression: W + lag(idh) * lag(Dh) + Divf + Divbj + Divbk - T - lag(ilh) * lag(Lh) - lag(imh) * lag(Mh)

equations.name: Pf
equations.expression: Y + ph * (Hh - lag(Hh)) + lag(idf) * lag(Df) - W - lag(ilf) * lag(Lf)

equations.name: Vcb
equations.expression: MRO + Ovd + Bcb + Rcb_l - Rcb_d - HPM

externals.name: tau
externals.desc: Tax rate on wages.

externals.name: a1
externals.desc: Propensity to consume out of income.

externals.name: a2
externals.desc: Propensity to consume out of past wealth.

externals.name: phi
externals.desc: Adaptive expectations parameter.

externals.name: b
externals.desc: Households' loan demand parameter.

externals.name: ph
externals.desc: House prices.

externals.name: delta0
externals.desc: Autonomous housing demand parameter.

externals.name: delta1
externals.desc: Housing demand parameter out of past house prices.

externals.name: delta2
externals.desc: Housing demand parameter out of mortgage interest.

externals.name: delta3
externals.desc: Autonomous mortgage demand parameter.

externals.name: delta4
externals.desc: Mortgage demand parameter out of mortgage interest.

externals.name: gk
externals.desc: Desired investments parameter.

externals.name: rho
externals.desc: Markup on prices.

externals.name: delta
externals.desc: Depreciation of capital.

externals.name: s
externals.desc: Firms' profit share distributed as dividends.

externals.name: sj
externals.desc: Bank-j profit share distributed as dividends.

externals.name: sk
externals.desc: Bank-k profit share distributed as dividends.

externals.name: sw
externals.desc: Parameter for the proportion of deposits held at the banks.

externals.name: m1
externals.desc: RSF factor on household loans.

externals.name: m2
externals.desc: RSF factor on mortgages.

externals.name: m3
externals.desc: RSF factor on bank-j bills.

externals.name: m4
externals.desc: RSF factor on bank-j bonds.

externals.name: m5
externals.desc: ASF factor on household deposits.

externals.name: m6
externals.desc: ASF factor on term interbank loans.

externals.name: alpha
externals.desc: Bank-j sensitivity to the outside spread for overnight borrowing.

externals.name: alpha1
externals.desc: Bank-j sensitivity to the interbank spread.

externals.name: alpha2
externals.desc: Bank-j sensitivity to degree of stability.

externals.name: alpha3
externals.desc: Bank-j sensitivity to the outside spread for term borrowing.

externals.name: alpha4
externals.desc: Bank-j sensitivity to PDU.

externals.name: ilcb
externals.desc: Central-bank lending-facility rate.

externals.name: PDU
externals.desc: Perceived degree of uncertainty.

externals.name: sigma
externals.desc: Bank-k autonomous willingness to lend overnight.

externals.name: sigma1
externals.desc: Bank-k sensitivity to PDU.

externals.name: sigma2
externals.desc: Bank-k sensitivity to the outside spread for overnight lending.

externals.name: sigma3
externals.desc: Bank-k sensitivity to the debt-to-equity ratio.

externals.name: sigma4
externals.desc: Bank-k sensitivity to the interbank spread.

externals.name: sigma5
externals.desc: Bank-k sensitivity to the term-rate outside spread.

externals.name: sigma6
externals.desc: Bank-k sensitivity to the quick ratio.

externals.name: idcb
externals.desc: Central-bank deposit-facility rate.

externals.name: sigmaib
externals.desc: Banks' sensitivity to interbank disequilibrium.

externals.name: eta1
externals.desc: Floor for the term interbank rate.

externals.name: eta2
externals.desc: Width parameter for the term interbank rate.

externals.name: omega1
externals.desc: Sensitivity to PDU in credit rationing.

externals.name: omega2
externals.desc: Sensitivity to past loans in credit rationing.

externals.name: chi1
externals.desc: Markup on loan interest rates.

externals.name: chi2
externals.desc: Markdown on deposit interest rates.

externals.name: chi3
externals.desc: Markup on mortgage interest rates.

externals.name: mu
externals.desc: Reserve requirement.

externals.name: ilrb
externals.desc: Rate of interest on bonds.

externals.name: gamma
externals.desc: Debt-to-equity threshold.

externals.name: lambda10
externals.desc: Liquidity-preference parameter of bank j for loans.

externals.name: lambda11
externals.desc: Bank-j liquidity preference out of the loan rate.

externals.name: lambda12
externals.desc: Bank-j liquidity preference out of the bond rate.

externals.name: lambda13
externals.desc: Bank-j liquidity preference out of the mortgage rate.

externals.name: lambda14
externals.desc: Bank-j liquidity preference out of the bills rate.

externals.name: lambda20
externals.desc: Liquidity-preference parameter of bank j for bonds.

externals.name: lambda21
externals.desc: Bank-j bond demand response to the loan rate.

externals.name: lambda22
externals.desc: Bank-j bond demand response to the bond rate.

externals.name: lambda23
externals.desc: Bank-j bond demand response to the mortgage rate.

externals.name: lambda24
externals.desc: Bank-j bond demand response to the bills rate.

externals.name: lambda30
externals.desc: Liquidity-preference parameter of bank j for mortgages.

externals.name: lambda31
externals.desc: Bank-j mortgage demand response to the loan rate.

externals.name: lambda32
externals.desc: Bank-j mortgage demand response to the bond rate.

externals.name: lambda33
externals.desc: Bank-j mortgage demand response to the mortgage rate.

externals.name: lambda34
externals.desc: Bank-j mortgage demand response to the bills rate.

externals.name: beta10
externals.desc: Bank-k liquidity-preference intercept.

externals.name: beta11
externals.desc: Bank-k liquidity preference out of the loan rate.

externals.name: beta12
externals.desc: Bank-k liquidity preference out of the bills rate.

cells.title: Baseline run
cells.description: Baseline simulation for the full Reale interbank-liquidity model.

cells.title: Scenario 1
cells.source: This scenario reproduces the paper's uncertainty experiment by increasing `PDU` from `0.1` to `0.6` from period 15 onward.

cells.title: Scenario 2
cells.source: This scenario reproduces the contractionary monetary-policy experiment by raising `ilcb` from `0.006` to `0.106` and `idcb` from `0.002` to `0.102` from period 15 onward.

cells.title: Interbank liquidity dependency graph
cells.description: Dependency view of the full paper model organized around central-bank operations, interbank funding, bank portfolios, and the real economy.
